description: Suggest shore strategy from scenario conditions and produce build checklist.
placeholderLabel: Placeholder rule. Link to actual citations after uploading your manuals.
warnings: Selection output is a planning aid only; verify design against current manual guidance.
Escalate to rescue specialist/engineer when loading uncertainty is high.
Confirm lumber/member dimensions and connection patterns before loading.
stepTemplates: Scenario indicates {recommendedShore} as initial shore strategy.
Set operational zone and establish spotter before shore placement.
Target configuration class: {shoreClass} with working clearance {clearanceFt} ft.
Build sequence: sole plate -> uprights/raker -> bracing -> wedge set -> recheck movement.
If movement increases, stop operations and reassess shore type and load path.
